summary:
Claim: Zinc polycarboxylate cement has a working time of about 3 minutes.  
Evidence: - It provides sufficient time for placement and adaptation without compromising handling. - Its working time is longer than glass ionomer cements but shorter than resin-based cements.  
Answer: C

Evidence: - It provides sufficient time for placement and adaptation without compromising handling. - Its working time is longer than glass ionomer cements but shorter than resin-based cements.  
Answer: C. Answer choice: C
